mission.title: cilium: CFP: CiliumNetworkPolicy `toFQDNs.matchPattern` should allow wildcarding of the `.` character to allow multiple levels of subdomains
mission.description: CFP: CiliumNetworkPolicy `toFQDNs.matchPattern` should allow wildcarding of the `.` character to allow multiple levels of subdomains. Requested by 32+ users.

steps.title: Check current cilium deployment
steps.description:
Verify your cilium version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium
helm list -n cilium 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working cilium installation.

steps.title: Review cilium configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant cilium configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium
kubectl get configmap -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cilium
```
## CiliumNetworkPolicy `toFQDNs.matchPattern` should allow wildcarding of the `.` character to allow multiple levels of subdomains

_2022-11-16: Updated issue description after discussions in comments.

steps.title: Apply the fix for CFP: CiliumNetworkPolicy `toFQDNs.matchPattern` should
steps.description:
Using * in CiliumNetworkPolicy to FQDNs.matchPattern does not include all levels of subdomains. This update to the docs clarifies this limitation.

Issue is highlighted in #22081 

Please ensure your pull request adheres to the following guidelines:
      description and a `Fixes: #XXX` line if
```yaml
- toFQDNs:
    - matchPattern: "example.com"
    - matchPattern: "*.example.com"
    - matchPattern: "*.*.example.com"
    - matchPattern: "*.*.*.example.com"
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium
kubectl get events -n cilium --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "CFP: CiliumNetworkPolicy `toFQDNs.matchPattern` should" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Using * in CiliumNetworkPolicy to FQDNs.matchPattern does not include all levels of subdomains. This update to the docs clarifies this limitation.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with cilium installed or the issue environment reproducible.
